text: You guys, I'm walking my dog, and I see these girls hiding behind a car with a water gun. And I'm having a full Raven Simone flashback, the youth are playing water assassins, oh my god! Like, I just like, I literally made my graduation sash yesterday, and the fact that four years ago, I was like getting shot in the face by like a max pressure super-soaker water gun at five a.m. in the morning, from a guy who was hiding underneath my mom's car. Like, it's just crazy to me, I can't believe that, anyways.
